LAGOS_BOUNDS_FAIL: You are too far away from your squad.
LAGOS_BUS_JUMP_FAILED: The KVA escaped with the hostage.
LAGOS_EXO_JUMP_HINT: [{+gostand}] automatically does an assisted exo jump thingy
LAGOS_EXO_JUMP_RELEASE_HINT: Press [{+actionslot 1}] to release exo lock thingy
LAGOS_FAIL_FRIENDLY_FIRE: Friendly fire will not be tolerated
LAGOS_FLY_DRONE_CONTROL: Use  to Move the Fly Drone
LAGOS_FLY_DRONE_CONTROL_PC: Use ^3[{+forward}],[{+moveleft}],[{+back}],[{+moveright}]^7 to Move the Fly Drone
LAGOS_FLY_DRONE_CONTROL_SP: Use  to Move the Fly Drone
LAGOS_HBREACH_TARGET: Highlight enemies then press ^3[{+attack}]^7 to Tag or Untag a Target
LAGOS_PLACE_SENSOR: Hold ^3[{+activate}]^7 to Plant the Harmonic Device
LAGOS_RELEASE_PM: Hold ^3[{+activate}]^7 to Rescue the Prime Minister
LAGOS_ROOF_MUTE_CHARGE: Hold ^3[{+activate}]^7 to Plant the Mute Charge
LAGOS_START_FLY_DRONE: Press ^3[{+activate}]^7 to Activate the Fly Drone
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_AJN_INDEEDMRBURKE: ^2Ajani: ^7Indeed, Mr. Burke.  All we need do is write a check and you arrive.
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_AJN_MYMENAREINPOSIT: ^2Ajani: ^7My men are in position. On your mark.
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_AJN_MYMENJUSTSPOTTE: ^2Ajani: ^7My men just spotted them leaving in a white box truck.
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_AJN_NIGERIANARMYGET: ^2Ajani: ^7NIGERIAN ARMY, GET DOWN!  OUT OF THE WAY!
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_AJN_NOTEVERYONEINTH: ^2Ajani: ^7Not everyone in the Nigerian Army is lacking experience.
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_AJN_ONTHEGROUND: ^2Ajani: ^7ON THE GROUND!  TAKE COVER!  OUT OF THE WAY!
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_AJN_PRIMEMINISTERWE: ^2Ajani: ^7Prime Minister, we are here to rescue--!
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_AJN_THISISCAPTAINAJ: ^2Ajani: ^7This is Captain Ajani, we need back-up!  We need back-up!
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_AJN_WAIT: ^2Ajani: ^7Wait!  Where are the other hostages?  There should be seven in total including the Prime Minister.  I see only three.
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_AJN_WELCOMETONIGERI: ^2Ajani: ^7Welcome to Nigeria, gentlemen.  But let us not delay, the Prime Minister remains in grave danger.  The honor of Nigeria is at stake.
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_AJN_WHATHAPPENEDWHA: ^2Ajani: ^7What happened?!  What happened?!  Is the Prime Minister okay?
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_BRK_75: ^2Burke: ^7...How the hell did the KVA get their hands on all this gear?!
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_BRK_ALLPARTOFTHESER: ^2Burke: ^7All part of the service, sir.  Mitchell, Joker, you're with me.
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_BRK_ALRIGHTAJANI: ^2Burke: ^7Alright, Ajani.  Tell your men to button it up.
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_BRK_ALRIGHTAJANI2: ^2Burke: ^7Alright, Ajani.  This puppy alone is worth the price of admission.
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_BRK_ALRIGHTLETSMOVE: [NEED_EN] ^2Burke: ^7好了，行动。阿尔法小队封锁现场。先生，你在这里很安全。
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_BRK_ALRIGHTMITCHELL: ^2Burke: ^7Alright Mitchell, you're our eyes. Recon shows four KVA in the room. Mark em.
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_BRK_BLOODYHELLTHEKV: ^2Burke: ^7Bloody hell, the KVA's got the bit between their teeth and aren't letting go!
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_BRK_CAPTAJANI: ^2Burke: ^7Capt. Ajani.  You have a friend in Atlas.
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_BRK_CHRISTTHEKVAHAV: ^2Burke: ^7Christ, the KVA have taken in up a notch!
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_BRK_DONTFUCKITUPMIT: ^2Burke: ^7Don't fuck it up, Mitchell.  This ain't no dummy-run.
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_BRK_DONTKNOWDONTCAR: ^2Burke: ^7Don't know, don't care.  Leave that to the boffins back at HQ.  Get your money's worth, Ajani?
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_BRK_HARMONICPULSE: ^2Burke: ^7Harmonic pulse. Reads biodensity through pretty much anything.
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_BRK_HOSTILESONLYMIT: ^2Burke: ^7Hostiles only, Mitchell. We don't want any dead civvies.
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_BRK_IDONTLIKETHELOO: ^2Burke: ^7I don't like the look of this.WATCH YOUR SHOT PLACEMENTS!This could turn into a fucking blood bath!
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_BRK_IDONTSEEAGUN: ^2Burke: ^7I don't see a gun on that one. You sure he's hostile?
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_BRK_IFWEATTACKNOWTH: ^2Ajani: ^7If we attack now, they will kill the Prime Minister.
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_BRK_LETSTAKEALOOK: ^2Burke: ^7Let's take a look. Mitchell, Joker, you're up.
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_BRK_LOOKSTOJOKERAND: ^2Burke: ^7 Drinks on me tonight.  Welcome to Atlas.
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_BRK_MITCHELLWENEEDE: ^2Burke: ^7Mitchell, we need eyes on the targets.
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_BRK_NODOZING: ^2Burke: ^7No dozing. Job's not over 'til I say so.
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_BRK_PAINTEMMITCHELL: ^2Burke: ^7Paint 'em, Mitchell.  Don't dick about, Mitchell.  Paint 'em.  Don't be shy, paint 'em.
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_BRK_PROPHETTHEYJUST: ^2Burke: ^7Prophet, they just executed a hostage. We're striking now.
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_BRK_PROPHETWEVECLEA: ^2Burke: ^7Prophet, we've cleared the perimeter building and are moving to the X.
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_BRK_PURSUINGTARGETS: ^2Burke: ^7Pursuing target, southbound the highway! Find transportation and follow!
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_BRK_RECONDRONESHOWE: ^2Burke: ^7Recon drone showed four KVA. Tag the hostiles, Mitchell.
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_BRK_THANKYOUSIR: ^2Burke: ^7Thank you, sir.  We'll make you proud.
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_BRK_THEBESTTHATMONE: ^2Burke: ^7The best that money can buy.  ...Boys, this is Capt. Ajani with the Nigerian Army.  It's our job to make them look good.
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_BRK_THETRUCKISEXITI: ^2Burke: ^7The truck is exiting the freeway!  Get to the off ramp!
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_BRK_THISISCAPTAINAJ: ^2Ajani: ^7This is Captain Ajani. Open fire, I repeat, open fire!
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_BRK_THREEMIKESTOPHA: ^2Gideon: ^7Three mikes to phase line alpha. Clock's on.
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_BRK_USEYOURMAGGRIPM: ^2Burke: ^7Use your mag grip, Mitchell!  ...C'mon!  Follow me!  Use your boosters!
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_BRK_USEYOURMAGGRIPT: ^2Burke: ^7Use your mag grip to balance yourself!
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_BRK_WATCHTHECIVILIA: ^2Burke: ^7Watch the civilians!  We can't afford any collateral!
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_BRK_WATCHYOURANGLES: ^2Burke: ^7Watch your angles!  Clear left, move right.
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_BRK_WEGOTTASITONTHA: ^2Burke: ^7We gotta sit on that goose until it lays a golden egg.  C'mon!
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_BRK_WEREGONNAHAVETO: ^2Burke: ^7We're gonna have to wing it!Mitchell, you think you're all that?  Follow me!  Engage your mag grip!  Joker, Ajani, find yourself some alternative transport!  ...JUMP!
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_BRK_WHOINVITEDTHESE: ^2Burke: ^7Who invited these muppets to the show?
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_BRK_YOUVEGOTYOURSEL: ^2Burke: ^7You've got yourself through selection, Mitchell.  You're playing with the big boys now and we play by 'big boy rules.' You fail here, you can't go cryin' to Mr. Irons.  Atlas expects you to be a team player and to hold yer own.  You don't wanna be the weakest link.
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_HADE_WEAREMENBORNTO: ^2Hades: ^7We are men...born to die. Some guilty, some innocent. The only question is when and how.
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_IRS_BURKELETSSHOWTH: ^2Irons: ^7Burke, let's show them what Atlas can do. I want the KVA running scared. A handshake from the Prime Minister and we could turn the whole region around. Get him out alive  ...No pressure.
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_JKR_AHARMONICPULSEW: ^2Joker: ^7A harmonic pulse: wall composition, density, life forms, objects--all in glorious 3D.
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_JKR_COULDTURNINTOAW: ^2Joker: ^7Could turn into a wild goose chase.
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_JKR_DONTWANTROADKIL: ^2Joker: ^7Don't want "road kill" on my grave stone.
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_JKR_FLYDRONESLIVE: ^2Joker: ^7Fly drone's live. Sending you the feed.
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_JKR_PLEASETELLMEHES: ^2Joker: ^7Please tell me this fucker is alive.
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_JKR_THATTURRETSARMO: ^2Joker: ^7That turret's armored. We're going to have to flank it.
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_JKR_THEHELLTHEYWANT: ^2Joker: ^7The hell do we want with this guy anyway?
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_JKR_WEGOTFIVEKVASOU: ^2Joker: ^7We got five KVA, south room on the second floor.
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_NGR_THISISTHENIGERI: ^2Nigerian Soldier: ^7This is the Nigerian Army! Surrender immediately!
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_NGR_YOUWILLNOTBEHAR: ^2Nigerian Soldier: ^7You will not be harmed if you leave the building peacefully!
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_PMR_IAMTHEONLYPERSO: ^2Prime Minister: ^7Please look, I, I am the only one who need remain, huh. Look, look, look, this man, he has a family. He will die without medical attention.
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_PMR_THEREAREINNOCEN: ^2Prime Minister: ^7There are innocent people here who need not be. Please, let them go. They are no use to you. I am the only person who need remain. Please. This man, he has a family! He is in desperate need of medical attention. Please!
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_PMR_THEYTOOKTHEOTHE: ^2Prime Minister: ^7They took the other hostages. The technologists from our summit. The KVA wanted them, not us.
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_PMR_WEALLLIVEBYGODS: ^2Prime Minister: ^7Look, we live by God's grace. His killing will achieve nothing.
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_PMR_YESHEHASASERIOU: ^2Prime Minister: ^7Yes, he has a serious condition--
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_PRT_BRAVOTWOONEYOUH: ^2Prophet: ^7Bravo-two-one, you have execute authority.  I repeat, execute authority.  This mission is a go, boys.  Good luck.
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_PRT_COPYATLASTWOONE: ^2Prophet: ^7Copy Atlas two-one, you have execute authority.
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_PRT_TWOONENIGERIANA: ^2Prophet: ^7Two-one, Nigerian army is moving to position.
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_PRT_TWOONETARGETTRU: ^2Prophet: ^7Two one, target truck egressing west on Liberty Highway, 500 meters.
^2Prophet: ^7Two-one, target truck's on the move, half a klick due south.
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_PRT_TWOONEWEHAVEATR: ^2Prophet: ^7Two-one, we have a traffic cam feed on a white box truck on Independence Road moving southwest of your position.
SUBTITLE_LAGOS_LAGOS_PRT_YOUSHOULDHAVEEY: ^2Prophet: ^7You should have eyes on the truck.
